message:
fix: restore SQLite backup on getBdBinary() failure in recovery (bd-ppnp)

sqliteIntegrityRecovery moved the database to a backup but did not
restore it when getBdBinary() failed, leaving users with no database
file. Now restores the main DB and sidecar files (-wal, -shm, -journal)
on failure, matching doltIntegrityRecovery pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
